tools.name: word.getAudio
tools.description: The metadata includes a time-expiring fileUrl which allows reading the audio file directly from the API.  Currently only audio pronunciations from the American Heritage Dictionary in mp3 format are supported.

tools.name: word.getHyphenation
tools.description: Returns syllable information for a word

tools.name: word.getPhrases
tools.description: Fetches bi-gram phrases for a word

tools.name: word.getRelatedWords
tools.description: Given a word as a string, returns relationships from the Word Graph

tools.name: word.getScrabbleScore
tools.description: Returns the Scrabble score for a word

tools.name: word.getTextPronunciations
tools.description: Returns text pronunciations for a given word

tools.name: word.getTopExample
tools.description: Returns a top example for a word

tools.name: words.getRandomWords
tools.description: Returns an array of random WordObjects

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
